styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, photographic documentary realism, restrained Nikon still-frame feel
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, readable signage, letters, numbers, black caption box, poster design, collage fragments, diagram, CAD render, white studio background, isolated product render, cutaway model, exploded view, red abstract object, red cube, red origami shape, red sculpture, saturated accent block, warning label, crowd chaos, collapse reenactment, gore, bodies, emergency spectacle, smoke, fire, debris field, plastic CGI surfaces, flattened render look, pseudo NASA logo, NASA meatball, NASA worm, mission patch, agency insignia, American flag, flag decal, USA marking, United States marking, Challenger wordmark, shuttle name text, wing text, body decals, countdown clock, readable control panel, whiteboard writing, technical wall chart, posted paper, binder spine label, folder label, paperwork text, chart labels, diagram marks, keyboard text, monitor text, warning label, button labels, numbered display, digital countdown, schematic arrows

cases.prompt_body: Photoreal documentary macro of a cold solid rocket booster field-joint exterior, pale off-white curved metal casing, one clean circumferential seam and restrained bolt rhythm, faint frost and cold gray inspection light, material evidence before failure explanation, no labels, no diagrams, no flame, no smoke, no readable markings

Photoreal macro side view of an industrial seal boundary, rubber gasket layer and pale metal casing edge visible under a narrow inspection light, one localized dark soot trace along the seam, physical evidence not a schematic, no arrows, no labels, no cutaway, no flame, no text

Photoreal institutional tabletop under flat fluorescent gray light, blank unmarked folders and a simple grid of empty slots, one muted red tab shape absorbed into the routine arrangement, line-item normalization without readable paperwork, no writing, no labels, no stamps, no UI, no documents with text

Photoreal late-1980s engineering meeting table detail, unbranded speakerphone or empty chair edge in the foreground, decision room background softly out of focus, cold fluorescent tabletop and blue edge light, burden shift carried by empty space and table geometry, no readable buttons, no paper text, no labels, no hands operating phone, no modern devices

Photoreal cold dawn launch-pad detail, tower steel and shuttle-adjacent infrastructure with frost and blue-gray haze, partial unmarked shuttle-era geometry kept secondary, environmental cold as the story carrier, documentary vertical frame, no plume, no smoke, no flame, no explosion, no logos, no readable markings

Photoreal wordless physical control-panel or launch-infrastructure detail with small unlabeled indicator lights, dark green-gray institutional color, one subtle amber light state among routine lights, system pressure without display text, no numbers, no countdown, no labels, no UI, no readable screens, no warning words
